name: @hachiware-labs/kizashi-skill
description: Kizashi Skill for source-driven problem hypothesis generation and review.

scripts.check: node --check bin/kizashi.js && node --check scripts/init-kizashi-project.js && node --check scripts/sources.js && node --check scripts/hypotheses.js && node --check scripts/run-task.js && node --check scripts/create-run.js && node --check scripts/summarize-outputs.js && node --check scripts/validate-skill.js && node scripts/validate-skill.js .
scripts.smoke: node bin/kizashi.js init --target .tmp-kizashi-smoke && node bin/kizashi.js sources list --target .tmp-kizashi-smoke && node bin/kizashi.js sources update --target .tmp-kizashi-smoke --id x_bookmarks --type browser_session --provider kimi-webbridge && node bin/kizashi.js sources show --target .tmp-kizashi-smoke --id x_bookmarks && node bin/kizashi.js hypothesize --target .tmp-kizashi-smoke --slug test-hypothesis --title "Test Hypothesis" && node bin/kizashi.js evaluate --target .tmp-kizashi-smoke --slug test-hypothesis && node bin/kizashi.js hypotheses list --target .tmp-kizashi-smoke && node bin/kizashi.js hypotheses show test-hypothesis --target .tmp-kizashi-smoke && node bin/kizashi.js hypotheses critique test-hypothesis --target .tmp-kizashi-smoke && node bin/kizashi.js hypotheses improve test-hypothesis --target .tmp-kizashi-smoke && node bin/kizashi.js run weekly_kizashi_review --target .tmp-kizashi-smoke --date 2026-05-17 && node bin/kizashi.js summarize --target .tmp-kizashi-smoke
